tasks.label: Run All Tests
tasks.command: node --test packages/protocol/test/protocol.test.js packages/native-host/test/daemon.test.js packages/native-host/test/native-host.test.js packages/agent-client/test/client.test.js && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.label: Tests + Typecheck
tasks.command: node --test packages/protocol/test/protocol.test.js packages/native-host/test/daemon.test.js packages/native-host/test/native-host.test.js packages/agent-client/test/client.test.js && npx tsc --noEmit
